title: Synthesis bug in ice40_dsp with signed constant input
body:
[fun.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/7981946/fun.zip)
## Steps to reproduce the issue

yosys> read_verilog fun.v
yosys> synth_ice40 -device u -retime -dsp -top fun
yosys> write_verilog fun_out.v

## Expected behavior

Signed constant `$signed(4'h7)` in multiply should be expanded to 16'h0007 input to SB_MAC16.

## Actual behavior

I've run the individual steps of `synth_ice40` and found that after `ice4_dsp` step, the SB_MAC16 input is 16'hffff.

```
dout_SB_MAC16_O (
    .A(din),
    .ACCUMCI(1'hx),
    .ACCUMCO(dout_SB_MAC16_O_ACCUMCO),
    .ADDSUBBOT(1'h0),
    .ADDSUBTOP(1'h0),
    .AHOLD(1'h0),
    .B(16'hffff),
    .BHOLD(1'h0),
    .C(16'h0000),
    .CE(1'h0),
    .CHOLD(1'h0),
    .CI(1'hx),
    .CLK(1'h0),
    .CO(dout_SB_MAC16_O_CO),
    .D(16'h0000),
    .DHOLD(1'h0),
    .IRSTBOT(1'h0),
    .IRSTTOP(1'h0),
    .O({ dout_SB_MAC16_O_O, dout }),
    .OHOLDBOT(1'h0),
    .OHOLDTOP(1'h0),
    .OLOADBOT(1'h0),
    .OLOADTOP(1'h0),
    .ORSTBOT(1'h0),
    .ORSTTOP(1'h0),
    .SIGNEXTIN(1'hx),
    .SIGNEXTOUT(dout_SB_MAC16_O_SIGNEXTOUT)
  );
```
